versioning_rules.workflow: data files are stored through Git LFS pointers while lineage metadata is committed to Git

transformations: landed unchanged in partitioned raw zone
landed unchanged in partitioned raw zone
landed unchanged in partitioned raw zone
landed unchanged in partitioned raw zone
drop duplicate clickstream and product rows
impute missing identifiers and product prices
parse event_timestamp as UTC
join clickstream events to product catalog on item_id
encode category, brand, and platform
normalize price
derive activity_count, avg_price, popularity, and recency

features.name: activity_count
features.transformation: count of interactions grouped by user_id

features.name: avg_price
features.transformation: average price grouped by user_id

features.name: popularity
features.transformation: count of interactions grouped by item_id

features.name: recency
features.transformation: time difference in seconds from latest event_timestamp
